2605.25676.title: Llamion Technical Report
2605.25676.paper_summary: We release Llamion, a family of 14B-parameter open-weight language models obtained by transforming Orion-14B into the standardized Llama-family architecture. The transformation is performed by Efficient Knowledge Preservation for Transformation (KEPT), a recipe that combines (i) Normal Parameter Mapping (NPM) for unchanged modules, (ii) Optimized Parameter Mapping (OPM), a training-free LayerNorm-to-RMSNorm initialization we prove optimal under the near-zero-mean activation regime induced by weight decay, and (iii) Cross-architecture Knowledge Distillation (XKD), an equal-size frozen-teacher distillation that aligns the converted model's outputs with the source model's on any reasonable input distribution. Llamion recovers Orion's behaviour on H6, MT-Bench, and KoMMLU with only ~123M tokens on a single A100 in four days; Llamion-Base reaches 66.87% on KoMMLU, exceeding the next-best entry of the Open Ko LLM Leaderboard by >7.0 absolute points at submission time. Capabilities entirely absent from the transfer corpus (Python programming and 200K-token context handling) survive the architectural transition intact. We release three checkpoints (Base, Chat, LongChat) that load with trust_remote_code=False in the Hugging Face Transformers library.
2605.25676.paper_summary_zh: 我們發布了 Llamion，這是一組 14B 參數的開放權重語言模型，通過將 Orion-14B 轉換為標準化的 Llama 家族架構而獲得。這一轉換是通過高效知識保存轉換（KEPT）來實現的，這是一個結合了 (i) 對於不變模塊的正常參數映射（NPM），(ii) 優化參數映射（OPM），這是一種無需訓練的 LayerNorm 到 RMSNorm 初始化，我們證明在由權重衰減引起的近零均值激活範圍內是最佳的，以及 (iii) 跨架構知識蒸餾（XKD），這是一種等大小的凍結教師蒸餾，將轉換模型的輸出與源模型在任何合理的輸入分佈上對齊。Llamion 在 H6、MT-Bench 和 KoMMLU 上恢復了 Orion 的行為，僅用約 123M 令牌在一個 A100 上花費四天；Llamion-Base 在 KoMMLU 上達到 66.87%，在提交時超過了 Open Ko LLM 排行榜的下一個最佳條目超過 7.0 個絕對點。從轉移語料庫中完全缺失的能力（Python 編程和 200K 令牌上下文處理）在架構轉變中保持完整。我們發布了三個檢查點（Base、Chat、LongChat），這些檢查點在 Hugging Face Transformers 庫中以 trust_remote_code=False 加載。
2605.25676.author: Kisu Yang et.al.
2605.25676.authors: Kisu Yang, Yoonna Jang, Hyeonseok Moon, Hwanseok Jang, Taewoo Lee, Hyungjin Lee, Jeseung Lee, Juhyoung Park, Heuiseok Lim
